Rules.desc: Command Chess is a turn-based military strategy game for 2 players. You command an army on a sandbox with rivers, mountains, and seas. Goal: capture the opponent's Commander to win.
Rules.d1: Each places 12 pieces in 3 rows: 10 face down (unknown to opponent), only Heli and 2 Ships are face up.
Rules.d2: Players alternate turns, moving 1 piece per turn. Can move to empty tiles or attack enemy pieces.
Rules.d3: Whoever captures the opponent's Commander wins immediately. Attack while protecting yours.
Rules.t1_d: Ground troops can walk or stand on rivers like land. Warships and Transports only move on water.
Rules.t2_d: Blocks Artillery vision. Helicopters can't land on it. Infantry on mountains move further.
Rules.t3_d: Most pieces are face down — creating a fog of war. Identity is revealed when they move or attack.
Rules.t4_d: Capture the opponent's Commander → Win immediately. Defending your Commander is top priority.
Rules.pieces_sub: 6 types you place + 2 ships available on map. Most start face down.
Rules.p1_m: Moves anywhere in 8 directions, no jumping. Can only kill enemies in adjacent tiles. Most important piece — if captured, you lose.
Rules.p2_m: Before crossing river: max 2 steps forward, attacks diagonally. After crossing: can move forward, side, or diagonally forward 1 step. No going backwards.
Rules.p3_m: Alone: jumps in L-shape like Knight in chess, can jump over pieces. Near allies: moves exactly 1 step forward.
Rules.p4_m: Moves anywhere in 4 straight directions, no jumping. Cannot cross rivers.
Rules.p5_m: Moves exactly 2 steps. Attacks by firing over 1 piece (fuse) to hit the first enemy behind it. Mountains block sight unless standing on one.
Rules.p6_m: Flies up to 4 tiles straight, goes over any terrain but cannot land on water/mountains. Cannot attack. Can transport 1 piece in 3 turns.
Rules.p7_m: Moves anywhere in 4 straight directions on water. Can bombard adjacent land tiles to kill enemies.
Rules.p8_m: Moves up to 4 tiles on water. Cannot attack. Can transport 1 ground troop across river in 3 turns.
Rules.note_desc: Unrevealed pieces can move up to 2 tiles in any direction. No jumping, no special skills. When moved or attacked with, it flips face up.
Rules.cta_sub: Create a free account and try your first match.
